tasks.description: Read all source files needed to implement: (1) agent files: tool-schemas.ts, generation.ts, create-task.ts, prompts.ts, (2) resolvers: zImageTurboI2I.ts, magicEdit.ts, imageUpscale.ts, videoEnhance.ts, characterAnimate.ts, travelBetweenImages.ts, (3) frontend model capabilities: src/tools/travel-between-images/modelCapabilities.ts, (4) existing harness: supabase/functions/_tests/harness/diverse-gen-test.ts and runner.ts. Verify exact param names, model ID strings, and default values before writing any code. In particular resolve FLAG-002 (does the travel resolver accept 'wan-2.2'/'ltx-2.3'/'ltx-2.3-fast' directly?), FLAG-003 (what is the actual default resolution for character-animate — plan says 720p but app uses 480p), and FLAG-004 (does a harness test file exist for generation types?).
tasks.executor_notes: Verified all requested source surfaces before any implementation. Resolver-param/default findings: `z_image_turbo_i2i` expects `image_url`, optional `prompt`, `strength`, `enable_prompt_expansion`, `numImages`, `loras`, `shot_id`, `based_on`, `source_variant_id`, `create_as_generation`, `tool_type`; `magic_edit` expects `prompt`, `image_url`, optional `negative_prompt`, `resolution`, `seed`, `in_scene`, `shot_id`, `output_format`, `enable_sync_mode`, `max_wait_seconds`, `enable_base64_output`, `tool_type`, `loras`, `based_on`, `source_variant_id`, `create_as_generation`, `hires_fix`, `qwen_edit_model`, `numImages`; `image_upscale` expects `image_url`, optional `generation_id`, `source_variant_id`, `scale_factor`, `noise_scale`, `output_format`, `shot_id`; `video_enhance` expects `video_url`, `enable_interpolation`, `enable_upscale`, optional `interpolation`, `upscale`, `shot_id`, `based_on`, `source_variant_id`; `character_animate` expects `character_image_url`, `motion_video_url`, optional `prompt`, plus `mode` and `resolution`. FLAG-002 resolved with source evidence: the travel resolver does not map friendly IDs itself, and app callers convert `wan-2.2` / `ltx-2.3` / `ltx-2.3-fast` to worker names before hitting `family: 'travel_between_images'`. FLAG-003 resolved: default character-animate resolution is `480p` in both resolver and frontend defaults. FLAG-004 resolved: `supabase/functions/_tests/harness/diverse-gen-test.ts` exists, but today it only covers 4 generation scenarios and will need expansion later.

tasks.description: Expand tool schema in tool-schemas.ts (Plan Step 1). Add 5 new task_type enum values: 'image-to-image', 'magic-edit', 'image-upscale', 'video-enhance', 'character-animate'. Add optional properties: model (enum of valid model IDs — use exact strings confirmed in T1, likely 'wan-2.2'/'z-image'/'qwen-image'/'ltx-2.3'/'ltx-2.3-fast'), video_url (string), strength (number 0-1). Update reference_image_urls description to cover all image-input task types.
tasks.executor_notes: Expanded the `create_task` schema to 10 task types total by adding `image-to-image`, `magic-edit`, `image-upscale`, `video-enhance`, and `character-animate`. Added optional `model`, `video_url`, and `strength` properties, broadened the `reference_image_urls` description to all image-input paths, and made `prompt` conditionally described instead of globally required. The model enum uses the T1-confirmed strings `wan-2.2`, `qwen-image`, `z-image`, `ltx-2.3`, and `ltx-2.3-fast`.

tasks.description: Add builder functions and routing in generation.ts (Plan Step 2). Extend CreateGenerationTaskArgs with video_url, strength, based_on, generation_id fields. Add 5 builder functions: buildZImageI2IInput, buildMagicEditInput, buildImageUpscaleInput, buildVideoEnhanceInput, buildCharacterAnimateInput — each producing the exact params its resolver expects (verified in T1). Update buildCreateTaskRequest switch to route new task types to correct family+builder. Update buildTravelBetweenImagesInput to pass model_name for LTX models (use exact model ID strings from T1). Update response label mapping for new families. IMPORTANT: For character-animate, use the default resolution confirmed in T1 (likely 480p per FLAG-003, NOT 720p as plan originally stated).
tasks.executor_notes: Extended `CreateGenerationTaskArgs` with `video_url`, `strength`, `based_on`, and `generation_id`. Added builder functions for `z_image_turbo_i2i`, `magic_edit`, `image_upscale`, `video_enhance`, and `character_animate`, each emitting the resolver-expected keys only: `image_url/prompt/strength/numImages/shot_id/based_on` for img2img, `prompt/image_url/numImages/shot_id/based_on` for magic edit, `image_url/generation_id/shot_id` for upscale, `video_url/enable_interpolation/enable_upscale/shot_id/based_on` for video enhance, and `character_image_url/motion_video_url/mode/resolution/prompt` for character animate. Updated routing to send each task type to its family, mapped friendly travel model IDs to worker model names, and used the confirmed `480p` default for character animate.

tasks.description: Update validation and param passing in create-task.ts (Plan Step 3). Expand SUPPORTED_CREATE_TASK_TYPES to include 5 new types. Relax prompt validation: image-upscale and video-enhance don't need prompts. Add per-type validation: image-to-image/magic-edit/image-upscale need reference_image_urls>=1; video-enhance needs video_url; character-animate needs reference_image_urls>=1 AND video_url. Extract lineage: derive based_on from selectedReferenceClips[0]?.generation_id. Pass new args (model_name, video_url, strength, based_on, generation_id for upscale) to createGenerationTask call.
tasks.executor_notes: Expanded `SUPPORTED_CREATE_TASK_TYPES` to the same 10-value surface as the schema. Prompt validation is now per-type so `image-upscale`, `video-enhance`, and `character-animate` can omit prompts while existing prompt-driven paths still require them. Added validation splits for image references, multi-image travel, and `video_url`, plus `strength` range checking. The tool now derives lineage from selected clips and passes `model_name`, `video_url`, `strength`, `based_on`, and `generation_id` through to `createGenerationTask`, while also including a selected video clip in shot lookup for video-enhance.

tasks.description: Update system prompt in prompts.ts (Plan Step 4). Add usage examples for each new task type (image-to-image with strength, magic-edit, image-upscale, video-enhance, character-animate) and model selection examples (z-image for t2i, ltx-2.3 for i2v). Add a brief model selection guide explaining when to use each model. Use exact model ID strings confirmed in T1.
tasks.executor_notes: Updated the system prompt with a model-selection guide, a task-type guide covering the five new paths, and concrete `create_task` examples for `image-to-image`, `magic-edit`, `image-upscale`, `video-enhance`, and `character-animate`. The examples use the exact schema param names (`model`, `reference_image_urls`, `video_url`, `strength`) and the T1-confirmed model IDs, including `z-image` for text-to-image and `ltx-2.3` for image-to-video.

tasks.description: Run tests and verify (Plan Step 5). First, run TypeScript compilation to catch type errors. Then find and run existing tests: check for files matching **/ai-timeline-agent/**/*.test.* and the harness at supabase/functions/_tests/harness/diverse-gen-test.ts. Run the edge smoke test suite (vitest with config/testing/vitest.edge.smoke.config.ts if it exists). If the harness test exists and covers generation types (confirmed in T1/FLAG-004), update it to include the 5 new task types. Fix any failures. Verify: no resolver files were changed (git diff should show only 4 agent files), all new task types route to correct families, lineage fields present in builder output, model ID strings match resolver expectations.
tasks.executor_notes: `npx tsc --noEmit` passed on the final tree. The discovered `supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/**/*.test.*` modules all passed when run as full files: `command-parser.test.ts`, `selectedClips.test.ts`, `loop.test.ts`, and `tools/clips.test.ts` passed 18/18 tests. `npm run test:edge:smoke` also passed with 104 passing smoke tests and 8 skipped. I updated `supabase/functions/_tests/harness/diverse-gen-test.ts` so it covers the 5 newly added generation paths plus the new model-selection cases, and corrected its assertions to match the resolver-facing payload keys (`model_name`, `image_url`, `generation_id`, `based_on`). Running the full harness module after that update is blocked in this sandbox before agent execution because Supabase test-user sign-in cannot resolve the external hostname (`getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND ...supabase.co`). To verify the bug fix without network access, I created and ran a short temporary runtime repro script against `createGenerationTask` with stubbed `fetch` and `Deno.env`; it passed for `text-to-image` with `z-image`, `image-to-video` with `ltx-2.3`, and the 5 new task types, confirming correct family routing, model-name mapping, lineage fields (`based_on` / `generation_id`), and `character-animate` default `resolution=480p`. Scoped status/diff confirms no edits under `supabase/functions/create-task/resolvers/`.

watch_items: FLAG-002 (open): Model ID surface mismatch — plan uses 'wan' but app uses 'wan-2.2'. T1 must confirm exact strings the travel_between_images resolver accepts. Use confirmed strings in T2/T3/T5.
FLAG-003 (open): Character animate default resolution — plan says 720p but app defaults to 480p. T1 must confirm; T3 must use confirmed value.
FLAG-004 (open): Harness test exists at diverse-gen-test.ts — T1 confirms scope, T6 must update it for new types rather than only doing manual verification.

Lineage (FLAG-001 addressed): based_on must flow from selectedClip.generation_id for img2img/magic-edit/video-enhance/character-animate. generation_id (not based_on) for image-upscale. source_variant_id is intentionally omitted.
No resolver changes: git diff at T6 must confirm only 4 agent files changed. Zero changes to supabase/functions/create-task/resolvers/.
DEBT task-system-integration: this plan adds 5 new task families — verify each builder's output shape matches its resolver's actual required fields, not just what the plan describes.
Model name passthrough: z-image and qwen-image must match what the image_generation resolver reads from model_name. Verify in T1 by reading the image_generation resolver.
Prompt relaxation: image-upscale and video-enhance don't need prompts. The validation change in T4 must not accidentally make prompt optional for types that still need it.

sense_checks.question: Were all 3 open flags (FLAG-002 model IDs, FLAG-003 character-animate resolution, FLAG-004 harness tests) concretely resolved with evidence from the source files?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. FLAG-002 was resolved from `travelBetweenImages.ts` plus frontend model-mapping sources, FLAG-003 from both resolver and frontend character-animate defaults, and FLAG-004 from the existing harness file and its current test-case list.

sense_checks.question: Does the task_type enum contain exactly 10 values (5 existing + 5 new), and does the model enum use the exact ID strings confirmed in T1 (not the plan's potentially wrong values)?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. `tool-schemas.ts` now exposes exactly 10 `task_type` values, and the `model` enum uses the T1-confirmed IDs `wan-2.2`, `qwen-image`, `z-image`, `ltx-2.3`, and `ltx-2.3-fast`.

sense_checks.question: Does each of the 5 new builder functions produce an object whose keys exactly match the corresponding resolver's required params (verified by reading the resolver in T1)?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. Each new builder in `generation.ts` was matched against the corresponding resolver contract from T1 and emits the resolver-specific keys rather than a generic payload shape.

sense_checks.question: Does the validation logic correctly distinguish which task types require prompt, which require reference_image_urls, and which require video_url — without breaking existing types?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. `create-task.ts` now separates prompt-required types, reference-image-required types, `image-to-video`'s 2+ image requirement, and `video_url`-required types without loosening validation for the older prompt-driven paths.

sense_checks.question: Do the system prompt examples use exact model IDs and param names matching the tool schema from T2?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. The prompt examples use the exact schema field names from T2 (`model`, `reference_image_urls`, `video_url`, `strength`) and the exact T1-confirmed model IDs, including `z-image` and `ltx-2.3`.

sense_checks.question: Does TypeScript compile cleanly, do all existing tests pass, and does git diff confirm changes are limited to the 4 agent files (plus harness test if updated)?
sense_checks.executor_note: Partially. TypeScript compiles cleanly, the targeted ai-timeline-agent tests pass, the edge smoke suite passes, and scoped git status/diff confirms no resolver edits with only the expected agent paths plus the harness in scope. The full existing edge unit suite does not fully pass in this worktree because of unrelated failures outside the ai-timeline-agent change surface, and the networked harness run is blocked by sandbox DNS.

meta_commentary:
Key execution guidance:

1. **T1 is the critical foundation.** The plan has 3 open flags that can only be resolved by reading actual source files. Do not start writing code (T2-T5) until T1 confirms: (a) exact model ID strings the resolvers accept, (b) character-animate default resolution, (c) harness test scope. The plan's values may be wrong — trust the code, not the plan text.

2. **T2-T5 are independent and can execute in parallel** after T1 completes, but the executor should apply them in order (schema → builders → validation → prompt) since later files reference types defined in earlier ones. TypeErrors from cross-file references won't surface until T6's compilation check.

3. **Model ID strings are the highest-risk detail.** The plan says 'wan' for text-to-image default but the app uses 'wan-2.2' for image-to-video. The image_generation resolver may expect different model_name values than the travel resolver. Read both resolvers in T1 and build a definitive mapping table.

4. **Lineage wiring is subtle.** based_on vs generation_id: most tasks use based_on (the parent generation's ID), but image-upscale uses generation_id directly. The upscale resolver may also accept both — check in T1. The source is selectedReferenceClips[0]?.generation_id from the SelectedClipPayload interface.

5. **Don't invent defaults.** Each builder should only pass params it has values for. Let the resolver's own defaults handle unspecified optional params (e.g., numImages, scale_factor, steps). This keeps the agent path minimal and consistent with resolver expectations.

plan_steps_covered.plan_step_summary: Step 1: Expand tool schema with new task types, model enum, video_url, strength
Step 2: Add builder functions for 5 new families, update routing, model passthrough, response labels
Step 3: Update validation, lineage extraction, and param passing in create-task.ts
Step 4: Update system prompt with examples and model guide
Step 5: Run tests, verify compilation, check harness, validate routing

validation.completeness_notes: T1 (read source files and resolve open flags) is not a plan step but is essential pre-work to resolve FLAG-002, FLAG-003, and FLAG-004 before writing code. The plan assumes these values are known; they are not. All 5 plan steps are covered by T2-T6.
